SEARCH
Package ch.ahdis.matchbox.config

Class MatchboxJpaConfig

java.lang.Object
ca.uhn.fhir.jpa.starter.common.StarterJpaConfig
ch.ahdis.matchbox.config.MatchboxJpaConfig
@Configuration @Import(ca.uhn.fhir.jpa.api.config.ThreadPoolFactoryConfig.class) @EnableConfigurationProperties(MatchboxFhirContextProperties.class) public class MatchboxJpaConfig extends ca.uhn.fhir.jpa.starter.common.StarterJpaConfig
